summary: Excellent soundboard recording of a classic second‑set performance featuring a standout "Eyes" and an inspired jam on "Around and Around".
review: KatfishJohn raves about this second set, calling it a classic that the band delivered with determination after their Egypt shows. Highlights include the “seemingly innocent” riff intro to Eyes that erupts into thunderous peaks and a sizzling jam on Around and Around despite technical hiccups. The soundboard source is described as fine and readily usable at any time.

ai_rating.rationale: A single, detailed 5‑star review praises both the musical performance (standout songs, overall classic vibe) and the recording quality, leading to a high rating with moderate confidence due to limited sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the recording as "fine" and readily usable; no complaints about clarity or mix, implying a crisp, well‑balanced soundboard capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set is described as consistently great with high energy; the band seemed determined to deliver a classic performance, resulting in strong flow and memorable peaks.

band_member_comments.Jerry: A fan asked him for banjo lessons mid‑set, indicating engaging stage presence and his instrumental versatility.
